title: Rich Racy Vietnamese Cabbage Salad
description: A buttery, snappy salad of shredded white cabbage, carrot, cucumber, and mint tossed in a light lime-soy dressing, topped with spherified lime foam for a burst of flavor.
instructions: Prepare white cabbage by removing outer leaves, shredding thinly, and placing in a large bowl.
Peel carrot and julienne, then add to the bowl with cabbage.
Dice cucumber and add to the bowl.
Add fresh mint leaves to the bowl.
Whisk lime juice, tamari, melted butter, lime zest, toasted sesame seeds, and a pinch of salt to create dressing.
Pour dressing over vegetables, toss to coat evenly, then refrigerate for 10 minutes to chill.
Dissolve 1 tsp sodium alginate in 2 tbsp lime juice using a hand blender until smooth.
In a separate cup, dissolve 1 tsp calcium lactate in 4 tbsp water to make a calcium bath.
Using a syringe or spoon, drop small spheres of lime alginate mixture into calcium bath to form spherified lime foam; stir gently for 1 minute.
Remove foam spheres with slotted spoon, drain, and serve on top of chilled cabbage salad, garnished with extra mint.
